old_value: {"id":"smallhold-d6u","title":"Delivery worker (tokio task, retry, circuit breaker)","description":"Implement the in-process delivery worker as a tokio task that continuously polls delivery_queue and delivers outbound ActivityPub activities via HTTP POST with HTTP signatures. Retry schedule: 1m, 5m, 30m, 2h, 8h, 24h (max 6 attempts, then dead_at). 410 Gone → dead immediately. 4xx (not 410) → dead after 1 retry. Per-domain circuit breaker: 10 consecutive failures → 1hr pause.","design":"Poll interval: configurable, default 5s. Batch size: configurable, default 100. Parallel delivery: tokio::spawn per delivery up to delivery_concurrency. HTTP signature: sign (request-target), host, date, digest. Digest: SHA-256 of body, base64. keyId: {actor_uri}#main-key. Circuit breaker: in-memory HashMap\u003cdomain, (fail_count, backoff_until)\u003e. Update next_attempt_at using retry schedule on failure.","acceptance_criteria":"Activity delivered to mastodon.social inbox with correct HTTP-Signature header; failed delivery retries on schedule; 410 Gone marks row dead immediately; circuit breaker prevents hammering dead domains; smallhold queue inspect shows pending deliveries","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:04:03Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:04:03Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4xr","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:04:06Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
